_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: Concentrations of CI-1033 as low as 250 nM and 500 nM suppressed the proliferation of ST88-14 and NF90-8 cultures
details: CI-1033 suppressed proliferation at concentrations as low as 500 nM
